title: FLOW Bond-Drift Baseline Pair
description: Schema for one labeled (baseline, candidate) CoNLL-U pair used to evaluate drift acceptability. See docs/flow/DATASET_SPEC_BOND_DRIFT.md. Blocking dependency: ANNOTATION_POLICY_DRIFT.md must be signed off before any records are labeled.

sent_id.description: If derived from §3.1 CoNLL-U gold, the matching sent_id.

baseline_conllu.description: Full multi-line CoNLL-U block for the baseline (source) parse.

candidate_conllu.description: Full multi-line CoNLL-U block for the candidate (FLOW output or synthetic) parse.

critical.description: True iff the changed edges affect a core grammatical relation (root, nsubj, obj, iobj). Gate G4 binds on the critical=true, drift_allowed=false subset.

drift_reason.description: Must cite a section id from ANNOTATION_POLICY_DRIFT.md (e.g. 'DRIFT-2.3'). Free-text without citation is invalid.

construction.description: Whether this pair was derived from a natural FLOW output or synthetically constructed.
